reason: Backend checklist and KGTraceVis invariants for source-constrained KG construction.
KG CSV contracts, source edge fields, merge rules, and reviewed-edge protection are central.
Reusable KG construction logic belongs under src/kgtracevis/kg_construction.
Loaders/exporters should raise deterministic validation errors.
Defines pytest, ruff, mypy, and example-run quality gates.
Several helper modules share node/edge contracts and should avoid duplicate definitions.
